challengeFiles.name: styles
script

tests.text: Your ingredientName variable should be the element returned from .getElementById() with the ingredient ID.
Your ingredientQuantity variable should be the element returned from .getElementById() with the quantity ID.
Your unitToConvert variable should be the element returned from .getElementById() with the unit ID.
Your numberOfServings variable should be the element returned from .getElementById() with the servings ID.
Your recipeForm variable should be the element returned from .getElementById() with the recipe-form ID.
Your resultList variable should be the element returned from .getElementById() with the result-list ID.

description: Konačno možete početi da uključujete svoju logiku u korisnički interfejs. Biće vam potrebno upitati DOM kako biste dobili nekoliko elemenata po ID-u. Dohvatite elemente sa ingredient, quantity, unit, servings, recipe-form, i result-list ID-ovima, i dodelite ih varijablama ingredientName, ingredientQuantity, unitToConvert, numberOfServings, recipeForm, i resultList odgovarajuće.
